basis.expansion: Every Cartesian product coordinate W x L x H is active.

H01.evidence: compose declares five services, but dependency health is incomplete

H02.evidence: SHA tags are required, but model-gateway reuses the manager image

H03.evidence: release evidence has a digest but no signature or independent recomputation

H04.evidence: rollback is a manual command planner, omits gateway coordinate, and does not enforce compatibility

H05.evidence: backup covers Hermes and clients directories only; database, secret version and proof refinding are absent

H06.evidence: Caddy health validates configuration; compose smoke accepts containers with no healthcheck

H07.evidence: Host Provisioner records partial destructive Docker failure; release-level deterministic fault injection is absent

H08.evidence: repair surfaces require deeper caller-level behavioral proof

H09.evidence: production compose grants docker.sock only to Host Provisioner; repository-wide negative proof remains required

H10.evidence: employee topology checks exist but are optional and target-host evidence remains external

H11.evidence: backup and release artifacts do not bind secret versions

H12.evidence: component proofs carry Git SHA, but one release-command-effect lineage is absent

H13.evidence: no workflow builds and inspects five distinct exact-SHA images

H14.evidence: current workflow preserves artifacts and separately enforces outcomes, but the base PostgreSQL job is red

H15.evidence: capacity harness lacks queue, SSE and fairness accounting

H16.evidence: pilot stop/rollback source schema not established

H17.evidence: Host Provisioner TTL uses replica Date.now; database remains authority for shared commercial windows

H18.evidence: effect ambiguity is durable, but release/operator terminality is incomplete

H19.evidence: rollback accepts an operator compatibility string rather than executable compatibility proof

H20.evidence: no representative 25-30 runtime result on a 64 GiB host is available
